mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (team_id, member_id, content) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{memberId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.team_id, c.member_id, c.content, c.created_at, m.nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT c.id, c.team_id, c.member_id, c.content, c.created_at, m.nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.id = #{id}
